original_snippet_context: Discussion on the creation of the Caixa de Conversão and government budget.
relevant_quote: Devolvido pela Câmara, que rejeitou a emenda do Senado, suppressiva do art. 8 do orçamento da fazenda
justification: This mentions the legislative process related to Article 8 of the budget, likely connected to the Caixa's funding, but doesn't express an opinion on the monetary policy itself.
